_comment: Experimental MegaMoE v2 forward() CUDAGraph E2E latency (ms), one fused op per rank, mean across 8 ranks. Regenerate with tests/kernels/mega_moe_exp/test_mega_moe_v2.py and write back to this file.
_captured: 8x AMD MI355X (gfx950), iters=20, expandable_segments. NOTE: v4_pro bs=16384 is omitted -- its fused-stage2 a2 buffer (max_recv*topk*inter_dim ~= 2.4e9 elems) exceeds the flydsl 32-bit buffer num_records cap; v4_flash bs=16384 fits.
